understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Move horizontally with MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; gravity then pulls you until landing. Avoid spikes `u`/`v`. Use CLICK on breakable `x` tiles to clear paths. Gravity direction determines fall (down = lower y, up = higher y). UNDO reverts actions. Corridor_scan and landing previews help plan safe passages.
